	If you&rsquo;re ready to be part of a team that creates timeless pieces with intention, we&rsquo;d love to hear from you.


Job Detail


	Support the creative process and bring ideal to life


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Portfolio to: Nicholestylish247@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Design Assistant Job at Nichole Stylish




        
    

        
        Nichole Stylish, a luxury fashion and bridal brand, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Design Assistant

Job Location: Nigeria
Job type: Full-time

Description


	We’re growing, and we’re looking for people who are passionate about craftsmanship, creativity, and excellence.
	If you’re ready to be part of a team that creates timeless pieces with intention, we’d love to hear from you.


Job Detail
     

            
    




	Support the creative process and bring ideal to life


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Health Officer",
  "description": "Malteser International is the international humanitarian relief agency of the Sovereign Order of Malta. For over 60 years we provide relief and recovery for people during and following conflicts and disasters around the world. Christian values and humanitarian principles form the foundations of our work.In over 30 countries in Africa, the Americas,Asia, Europeand the Middle East, we support people in need&ndash;regardless of their religion, origin or political convictions.

Malteser International has been working in Nigeria since 2017. In Northeast Nigeria and more specifically in Borno State, MI is currently active in the WASH sector for improving the lives of both the IDP population as well as the host communities. The WASH activities focus on improved access to safe water, sanitation and hygiene. They include NFI distribution, solarization of boreholes, rehabilitation of hand pumps, construction of latrines and hygiene promotion. Malteser International thereby applies a participatory, gender sensitive and inclusive approach ,food nutrition,security and livelihood.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Health Officer

Job Location: Maiduguri, Borno
Employment Type: Full-time
Start Date: July 2026
Duration of contract: September 2026 with possibility of extension.

Job Description


	Oversee the daily functioning of assigned Oral Rehydration Points (ORPs) while ensuring compliance with national cholera treatment protocols and uninterrupted service delivery.
	Assess and manage patients with acute watery diarrhoea/cholera, administer ORS for mild cases, stabilize patients, and promptly refer moderate and severe cases to Cholera Treatment Centres (CTCs).
	Enforce IPC measures, including hand hygiene, proper PPE use, environmental cleaning, safe waste management, and prompt reporting of IPC concerns.
	Conduct health education on cholera prevention, hygiene, sanitation, safe water practices, early treatment seeking, and strengthen community referral systems.
	Monitor and maintain adequate stocks of ORS, Zinc, PPE, medicines, and consumables through proper inventory management, storage, and timely replenishment.
	Keep accurate patient and referral records, submit regular reports, support disease surveillance, monitor ORP performance, and collaborate with health authorities and humanitarian partners.
	Adhere to organizational policies, including safeguarding and PSEAH standards, report safeguarding concerns, and ensure accountability to affected populations.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Nursing (B.NSc.), Public Health, or a related health discipline, with valid professional registration where applicable.
	Minimum of three (3) years of experience in humanitarian or public health programmes, including cholera outbreak response, emergency health, or communicable disease control.
	Additional training in cholera case management, IDSR, Infection Prevention and Control (IPC), or emergency health is an added advantage.
	Previous experience working in Oral Rehydration Points (ORPs), Cholera Treatment Units (CTUs), Cholera Treatment Centres (CTCs), or with NGOs/international humanitarian organizations is desirable.
	Strong clinical assessment, patient management, organizational, reporting, communication, and supervisory skills, with knowledge of cholera treatment protocols and IPC standards.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook
	Fluency in English; knowledge of Hausa and Kanuri is an added advantage
	The position is based in Maiduguri and requires frequent travel to project sites, as well as availability to work weekends, public holidays, and extended hours during outbreak response.


What we offer


	Salary according to Malteser International salary grade
	Other benefits: Group Life Insurance premium, Health insurance Package (Single / family Plan),13th Month pay.
	Annual Leave + Compensation Leave + Academic Leave + Wedding Leave + Compassionate Leave - applicable.


Note


	Candidates are to submit your extensive application (CV, letter of motivation, and three professional references) online.
	Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.

Health Officer Job at Malteser International




        
    

        
        Malteser International is the international humanitarian relief agency of the Sovereign Order of Malta. For over 60 years we provide relief and recovery for people during and following conflicts and disasters around the world. Christian values and humanitarian principles form the foundations of our work.In over 30 countries in Africa, the Americas,Asia, Europeand the Middle East, we support people in need–regardless of their religion, origin or political convictions.
     

            
    



Malteser International has been working in Nigeria since 2017. In Northeast Nigeria and more specifically in Borno State, MI is currently active in the WASH sector for improving the lives of both the IDP population as well as the host communities. The WASH activities focus on improved access to safe water, sanitation and hygiene. They include NFI distribution, solarization of boreholes, rehabilitation of hand pumps, construction of latrines and hygiene promotion. Malteser International thereby applies a participatory, gender sensitive and inclusive approach ,food nutrition,security and livelihood.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Health Officer

Job Location: Maiduguri, Borno
Employment Type: Full-time
Start Date: July 2026
Duration of contract: September 2026 with possibility of extension.

Job Description


	Oversee the daily functioning of assigned Oral Rehydration Points (ORPs) while ensuring compliance with national cholera treatment protocols and uninterrupted service delivery.
	Assess and manage patients with acute watery diarrhoea/cholera, administer ORS for mild cases, stabilize patients, and promptly refer moderate and severe cases to Cholera Treatment Centres (CTCs).
	Enforce IPC measures, including hand hygiene, proper PPE use, environmental cleaning, safe waste management, and prompt reporting of IPC concerns.
	Conduct health education on cholera prevention, hygiene, sanitation, safe water practices, early treatment seeking, and strengthen community referral systems.
	Monitor and maintain adequate stocks of ORS, Zinc, PPE, medicines, and consumables through proper inventory management, storage, and timely replenishment.
	Keep accurate patient and referral records, submit regular reports, support disease surveillance, monitor ORP performance, and collaborate with health authorities and humanitarian partners.
	Adhere to organizational policies, including safeguarding and PSEAH standards, report safeguarding concerns, and ensure accountability to affected populations.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Nursing (B.NSc.), Public Health, or a related health discipline, with valid professional registration where applicable.
	Minimum of three (3) years of experience in humanitarian or public health programmes, including cholera outbreak response, emergency health, or communicable disease control.
	Additional training in cholera case management, IDSR, Infection Prevention and Control (IPC), or emergency health is an added advantage.
	Previous experience working in Oral Rehydration Points (ORPs), Cholera Treatment Units (CTUs), Cholera Treatment Centres (CTCs), or with NGOs/international humanitarian organizations is desirable.
	Strong clinical assessment, patient management, organizational, reporting, communication, and supervisory skills, with knowledge of cholera treatment protocols and IPC standards.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook
	Fluency in English; knowledge of Hausa and Kanuri is an added advantage
	The position is based in Maiduguri and requires frequent travel to project sites, as well as availability to work weekends, public holidays, and extended hours during outbreak response.


What we offer


	Salary according to Malteser International salary grade
	Other benefits: Group Life Insurance premium, Health insurance Package (Single / family Plan),13th Month pay.
	Annual Leave + Compensation Leave + Academic Leave + Wedding Leave + Compassionate Leave - applicable.


Note


	Candidates are to submit your extensive application (CV, letter of motivation, and three professional references) online.
	Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Inventory Officer Job at RecruitNG




        
    

        
        RecruitNG, a recruitment and job vacancy website/Company, is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location: Eti-Osa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking an Inventory Officer to oversee and monitor the inflow, management, and records of stock on a daily basis.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Prepare purchase orders
	Receive, store, and issue inventories
	Manage stock levels and distribute supplies from stock
	Work with the team to prepare and maintain inventory/stock records
	Carry out quality and quantity checks on inventory received
	Notify team of new inventory received
	Manage surplus or obsolete stock using FIFO and LIFO procedures
	Check that supply invoices and purchase orders tally in price and quantity
	Prepare reports on damaged, spoilt, or adjusted inventories
	Place orders to replenish stock while avoiding insufficiencies or excessive surplus
	Source suppliers and obtain quotes
	Evaluate suppliers to achieve cost-effective deals and maintain trust relationships
	Maintain records of receipts and issuance of items from the storeroom
	Reconcile physical stock with inventory records or system logs
	Ensure proper arrangement of stock for easy retrieval
	Responsible for the overall maintenance of the storerooms
	Ensure compliance with PH and safety regulations and guidelines
	Supervise offloading and arrangement of merchandise and materials
	Report stock levels and related issues to the F&B Officer
	Perform other duties as assigned


Requirements


	B.Sc./HND in Accounting, Economics, Statistics, or other relevant qualification with 2-3 years of experience as an Inventory Officer
	Knowledge of inventory management and storage methods
	Sound knowledge of inventory management software (ERP) and inventory tracking tools
	Ability to track inventory and generate reports
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite including Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
	Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time efficiently
	High level of professionalism
	Good initiative, time, and stress management skills
	Good interpersonal communication abilities
	Strong organizational skills with attention to detail
	Good problem-solving capabilities
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision
	Passion for data, creating efficiencies, and understanding processes end-to-end
	A team player who communicates and works well with a wide range of people
	Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment while taking initiative.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
